subject: chore(docs+test): self-review pass — stale refs fixed, wheelSensitivity tripwire, SESSION_NOTES rewrite
body:
Self-review of the session's work caught a few small follow-ups:

- src/config.test.ts: added a test asserting wheelSensitivity defaults
  to 0.3. Previously the field had no test; a future change that drops
  back to Cytoscape's library 1.0 (or removes the field) would have
  silently regressed desktop zoom feel.

- src/services/queryEngine.ts: reworked the file-header doc comment.
  It still claimed the parser/evaluator/AST live in queryParser.ts
  with an "840-line split" rationale that was true at the time of the
  first split but stale after the second split (queryParser.ts is now
  a 22-line barrel; the real code lives in src/services/query/*).

- CLAUDE.md "Query engine" bullet: refreshed to describe the new
  src/services/query/ layout and that queryParser.ts is the barrel.

- docs/SESSION_NOTES.md: rewrote as a compact end-of-session snapshot
  per CLAUDE.md's directive ("Rewritten at the end of each AI session").
  The 13-numbered-item mid-session running log was useful while in
  progress; the next session needs the punchline + active context, not
  the play-by-play. Old item-1 said "all 7 callsites" but I'd moved
  getNodeColor mid-session, so the count was stale anyway — the rewrite
  drops the per-callsite breakdown that's already in git history.

337 tests pass (up from 336). Lint + build clean.

Tags: docs, test, cleanup, self-review
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: alpha-debug-system
Semver: patch

title: self-review pass — stale refs fixed, wheelSensitivity tripwire, SESSION_NOTES rewrite
